scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_despacho AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    NULL AS ci_beneficiaria,
    (SELECT TOP 1 nombre FROM as_almacenes_silver WHERE almacen_id = t.almacen_id) AS nombre_lugar,
    'Paquete Subsidio' AS nombre_producto,
    CAST((SELECT TOP 1 nit FROM as_transportistas_silver WHERE transportista_id = t.transportista_id) AS VARCHAR(50)) AS nit_transportista,
    (SELECT TOP 1 placa FROM as_vehiculos_silver WHERE vehiculo_id = t.vehiculo_id) AS placa_vehiculo,
    'Despacho Almacen' AS nombre_evento,
    'Logistico' AS categoria_evento,
    nro_lote,
    NULL AS nro_boleta_sup,
    nro_guia_despacho AS nro_guia_remision,
    CAST(cantidad_despachada AS INT) AS cantidad_bienes,
    CAST(0.00 AS DECIMAL(8,2)) AS peso_total_kg,
    0.00 AS valor_economico_bs,
    NULL AS temperatura_llegada
FROM as_despachos_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_recepcion AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    NULL AS ci_beneficiaria,
    (SELECT TOP 1 nombre FROM as_almacenes_silver WHERE almacen_id = t.almacen_id) AS nombre_lugar,
    'Paquete Subsidio' AS nombre_producto,
    CAST((SELECT TOP 1 nit FROM as_transportistas_silver WHERE transportista_id = t.transportista_id) AS VARCHAR(50)) AS nit_transportista,
    (SELECT TOP 1 placa FROM as_vehiculos_silver WHERE vehiculo_id = t.vehiculo_id) AS placa_vehiculo,
    'Recepcion Almacen' AS nombre_evento,
    'Logistico' AS categoria_evento,
    nro_lote,
    NULL AS nro_boleta_sup,
    nro_guia_remision,
    CAST(cantidad_recibida AS INT) AS cantidad_bienes,
    CAST(0.00 AS DECIMAL(8,2)) AS peso_total_kg,
    0.00 AS valor_economico_bs,
    temperatura_llegada
FROM as_recepciones_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_entrega AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    punto_entrega AS nombre_lugar,
    productos AS nombre_producto,
    NULL AS nit_transportista,
    NULL AS placa_vehiculo,
    'Entrega Agencia' AS nombre_evento,
    'Logistico' AS categoria_evento,
    lote AS nro_lote,
    NULL AS nro_boleta_sup,
    NULL AS nro_guia_remision,
    1 AS cantidad_bienes,
    CAST(peso_kg AS DECIMAL(8,2)) AS peso_total_kg,
    0.00 AS valor_economico_bs,
    NULL AS temperatura_llegada
FROM spl_entregas_agencia_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_retiro AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    (SELECT TOP 1 CONCAT(cadena, ' - ', sucursal) FROM spl_supermercados_autorizados_silver WHERE supermercado_id = t.supermercado_id) AS nombre_lugar,
    tipo_carne AS nombre_producto,
    NULL AS nit_transportista,
    NULL AS placa_vehiculo,
    'Entrega Supermercado' AS nombre_evento,
    'Logistico' AS categoria_evento,
    'N/A' AS nro_lote,
    NULL AS nro_boleta_sup,
    NULL AS nro_guia_remision,
    1 AS cantidad_bienes,
    CAST(cantidad_kg AS DECIMAL(8,2)) AS peso_total_kg,
    CAST(monto_bs AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS valor_economico_bs,
    NULL AS temperatura_llegada
FROM spl_entregas_supermercado_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_entrega AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    (SELECT TOP 1 nombre FROM sup_establecimientos_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS nombre_lugar,
    paquete_nombre AS nombre_producto,
    NULL AS nit_transportista,
    NULL AS placa_vehiculo,
    'Entrega Paquete Subsidio' AS nombre_evento,
    'Logistico' AS categoria_evento,
    lote_produccion AS nro_lote,
    CAST((SELECT TOP 1 nro_boleta FROM sup_boletas_silver WHERE boleta_id = t.boleta_id) AS VARCHAR(100)) AS nro_boleta_sup,
    NULL AS nro_guia_remision,
    1 AS cantidad_bienes,
    CAST(peso_paquete_kg AS DECIMAL(8,2)) AS peso_total_kg,
    0.00 AS valor_economico_bs,
    NULL AS temperatura_llegada
FROM sup_entregas_silver t',
